title: 裂镜重圆
synopsis: 民国三年（1914年）9月12日，天津西郊林家。家主人林居尚即将年满五十，生辰在即。然而在这座大院重楼里，一场精心策划的暗杀正在上演——「裂镜」组织的目标是卢恩健，而真凶就藏在幸存者之中。
styleGuide: 1914 Republican era Chinese mansion in Tianjin, traditional architecture, oil painting style, dramatic lighting, mysterious atmosphere

cover.prompt: Vertical poster for a 1914 Chinese mansion murder mystery. Traditional Tianjin architecture, oil painting style, dramatic lighting, six silhouettes in period costumes, mysterious atmosphere
